nodes.context: New York City waterfront street gang active mid-19th century, dominated dockyards of New York Harbor.
Rival waterfront gang that the Swamp Angels merged into at the end of the 19th century.

edges.evidence_quote: until eventually they merged with the rival waterfront gangs into the White Hand Gang at the end of the 19th century.
edges.context: Swamp Angels merged with rival waterfront gangs into the White Hand Gang.
